task_completion.description: Agent selects the measurement tool in 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module is open, or the ruler/line icon in the toolbar is highlighted/selected.

task_completion.description: A measurement line is created on the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line with endpoints is drawn within one of the 2D slice views (Red, Yellow, or Green view).

task_completion.description: The measurement is placed across the tumor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement line spans the hyperintense (bright white) region of the brain scan, representing the tumor.

task_completion.description: The measured diameter is within the acceptable tolerance
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement value displayed next to the line or in the Markups table is between 25.0 mm and 65.0 mm.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement to the specified file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Data' dialog or Markups export section is visible, showing the filename 'tumor_diameter.mrk.json'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the 3D Slicer GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Slicer menus, toolbars, and views, rather than only terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent does not manually type the result into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent does not open a text editor to manually write a JSON file with a hardcoded number.

integrity.description: The result is derived from the visual measurement tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved value corresponds to the measurement visible in the Slicer scene, not an arbitrary number.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground truth diameter: 45.0 mm. Tolerance: 20.0 mm. Acceptable range: 25.0 mm - 65.0 mm. The tumor appears as a hyperintense (bright) region on the FLAIR MRI.
